name: Personalize marketing emails with AI
description: Takes customer data (name, product, feedback), uses Claude AI to analyze sentiment and personalize email copy, then sends the personalized marketing email via Gmail.

source.originalName: Personalize marketing emails using customer data and AI

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status notifications

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for email send confirmation

productName.description: Name of the product the customer purchased

customerFeedback.description: Customer's product feedback or review text

senderName.description: Name to use in email signature

steps.name: Build AI prompt for sentiment analysis and email personalization
Run Claude AI for email personalization
